questions.text: When returning goods from an affiliate to the factory (AFM to AFI), what is a pre-requisite action?
options: Sending a D003 UD from the factory
Creating a return sales order in NEO
Generating an invoice in the legacy system

questions.text: In the new process for AFM to AFI returns, what stock type should be selected in the delivery view of the Purchase Order (PO)?

What is the correct order of these steps in the Direct Flow Return process for POs:
A. Good Issue 
B. Return to done in Blocked Stock
C. Choose Type of PO for Return (ZICR)
D. Creation of the Outbound delivery in blocked Status
ZICR is a type of Purchase Order used for what purpose within the new system?
options: Standard Purchase Orders for raw materials.

questions.text: True or False: The Mass PO and STO Closure report allows for the simultaneous closure of multiple Purchase Orders and Stock Transport Orders.
